name: Fundamental Analysis
description: A 6-week course on evaluating companies through financial statements, valuation metrics, and economic indicators.

weeks.journal_prompt: Review a company's income statement, balance sheet, and cash flow statement. What stands out about their financial health?
Compare the P/E, P/B, and P/S ratios of two tech companies. Which appears more fairly valued and why?
Research a company's last earnings report. Did they beat or miss estimates? How did the stock react and why?
Compare three companies in the same industry using key financial metrics. Which is the strongest competitor?
How do interest rates, inflation, and GDP growth affect the stocks and bonds you are tracking?
Write a full investment thesis for one company: financial health, valuation, competitive position, risks, and your conclusion.
